publication_safe_interpretation: Generated controlled ZIP reportedly failed the picker route while an uploaded control worked; current ZIP bytes are verified but picker screenshots and object IDs are withheld.
A second recorded generated-ZIP picker comparison failed while uploaded control behavior was operational; origin lineage and uploaded comparison bytes are unavailable.
Nine recorded audits did not resolve independently usable generated ZIPs. They are relevant but are not direct picker comparisons and the primary audit source is not included.
No successful generated-ZIP reuse specimen was identified among the eleven records; this is not a universal rate or population estimate.
